_note: Balancer V3 LIVE-state reads the on-chain solver replays into a StableMath quote ladder (segKind 14). getCurrentLiveBalances / getStaticSwapFeePercentage target the CREATE2 Vault singleton (cfg[10]); getAmplificationParameter targets the POOL; getRate targets each token's rate provider (a plain uint256 SCALAR — v12-safe, unlike getPoolTokenRates which nests a dyn array in a tuple and decodes to garbage on v12). getCurrentLiveBalances is a BARE dyn array — it must be INLINE-INDEXED ([k]) and NEVER stored in a var (storing reverts on v1). One combined ABI so a single import can .at() the Vault, the pool, and either rate provider.
